zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Howard於1336年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親John Howard27歲，母親Alice de Bois27歲。他於1363年3月10日之前與Margaret Scales在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年7月3日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Howard于1336年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲John Howard27岁，母亲Alice de Bois27岁。他于1363年3月10日之前与Margaret Scales在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年7月3日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Howard was born in 1336, in Suffolk, England, his father, John Howard, was 27 and his mother, Alice de Bois, was 27. He married Margaret Scales before 10 March 1363, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 July 1388, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in East Winch, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Howard est né en 1336, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Howard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bois, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Scales avant 10 mars 1363, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Howard 1336 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Howard 27 und seine Mutter Alice de Bois 27. Er hat vor 10. März 1363 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Scales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Juli 1388 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in East Winch, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Howard è nato il nel 1336 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Howard, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Bois, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Scales prima del 10 marzo 1363, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1388, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a East Winch, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Howardが1336年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父John Howardは27歳，母Alice de Boisは27歳であった。1363年3月10日以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Scalesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年7月3日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Howard(이)가 1336년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Howard(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Bois(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1363년 3월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Scales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 7월 3일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에 묻혔다.

mn.Wallingford, Berkshire, England: Wallingford, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Howard nasceu em 1336, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Howard, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bois, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Scales antes 10 de março de 1363, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1388, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Howard родился в 1336 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Howard было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bois, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Scales перед 10 марта 1363 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 июля 1388 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Howard nació en 1336, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Howard, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alice de Bois, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Scales antes de 10 de marzo de 1363, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1388, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
